value.fullName: None or limited importance to relevant evaluators
value.label: None or limited importance to relevant evaluators

value.fullName: Deal has support from the relevant evaluators and meets customer requirements
value.label: Deal has support from the relevant evaluators and meets customer requirements

value.fullName: Deal meets significant customer requirements and has support among decision makers
value.label: Deal meets significant customer requirements and has support among decision makers

value.fullName: Critical importance to customer and required approvals to proceed have been secured
value.label: Critical importance to customer and required approvals to proceed have been secured
